heading: Omitted
label: 727 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , which provided that nothing in this subchapter would affect the status of the members of the tribes as citizens of the United States, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.act Aug. 23, 1954, ch. 831, § 768 Stat. 769
